// Settings Screen Share and Feedback Use voice typing Number row Sound on key-press Long press for symbols Show popup on keypress Vibration on keypress Enable gesture delete Rate Us More Apps Themes Keyboard Settings Test Your Keyboard Test Theme Feature does not working Too many ads I don’t need it Other Message Next Done Tap Here To Exit See More Explore More Sindhi Keyboard Daily Status Sindhi Status Settings Translation Speech to text Conversation Explore Feature We build what you desire Select features fit your needs Wallpapers Sindhi Editor Live Themes Photo Keyboard Photo Translator Instant Stickers Initializing Consent Setup... Customize your Sindhi Keyboard with vibrant and stylish themes. Enhance your communication with beautiful Sindhi language expression. Express yourself with fun stickers and emojis while typing in Sindhi. Disable Remove Ads Speech to\ntext Share app Dictionary Favourite Coming Soon Text Resize Text Reverse Text Translator Text to audio file Ad Sindhi Editor Sindhi Stickers Stickers Add Starting download... Stickers Details Speak in English Listening… Ended… No Stickers Added Add Stickers BG Color The changes will not be saved. Are you sure you want to quit? Are you sure you want to clear conversation? Cancel Anytime Save Cancel Add Text Background Enter Text Select Font Select Fonts Select Background Images Phone Storage Select Stickers View More Add Sticker Quit Editing Save Poster Are you sure to Save Changes? No Text There is no text in the field! Discard Recent Colors OK
Hello blank fragment Write to translate… Details Details Upgrade to Premium & Get Ad-Free Experience Free Photo Translator to Multiple Languages You may manage or cancel subscriptions on Google Play Term & Services Privacy Policy How to Unsubscribe? Ad-Free Experience: Enjoy an ad-free environment with the Urdu Keyboard VIP subscription. Payment Process: Once you confirm a purchase, the subscription fee will be billed through the Google Play Store. Cancellation Terms: If you decide to cancel, the subscription will remain active until the end of the current month or year billing cycle. Automatic Renewal: Loading Subscription Details Subscriptions will automatically renew, unless you turn off the auto-renewal feature at least 24 hours before the current period ends. Managing Your Subscription: You have the control to manage your subscription and disable auto-renewal in your Google Play Store account settings. Manage Subscription Manage Subscription here, No Initial Payment, Cancel Anytime Get Premium Now All Features Unlocked Access All Features Access All Features Icon 100% Ads Free Experience No Ads Unlimited Access UnInstall Change Theme
